expectations.text: signup form 상태를 담당하는 훅이 hooks/utils/auth 경로에 생성된다
expectations.evidence: Hook at hooks/utils/signup/useSignupForm/index.ts (domain=signup per coding-rules.md page segment rule), not hooks/utils/auth/

expectations.text: signup submit을 담당하는 훅이 hooks/apis/auth/mutations/usePostSignup 경로에 생성된다
expectations.evidence: No separate API mutation hook created; submit logic is inline in useSignupForm

expectations.text: 비 API 훅이 hooks/utils/{domain}/{hookName}/index.ts 패턴으로 생성된다
page에서 직접적인 fetch/business logic이 남지 않는다
expectations.evidence: Page only destructures hook return and renders form UI
